name: OmopConditionConditionOccurrenceView
title: Condition → condition_occurrence (FHIR-flat, stage 1)
description: Stage 1 of FHIR→OMOP: one flat row per Condition, preserving raw FHIR values. Code system fan-out — extract one column per known vocabulary so stage 2 can pick the best one deterministically (preferring SNOMED, which is already standard for OMOP Condition domain, then falling back to ICD10CM / ICD9CM / ICD10). Avoids the coding.first() ordering hazard.

column.name: id
column.description: FHIR Condition.id (Synthea UUID). → condition_source_value + surrogate condition_occurrence_id.

column.name: encounter_ref
column.description: Reference to the encounter where this condition was diagnosed/recorded. → visit_occurrence_id.

column.name: code_snomed
column.description: SNOMED CT code (preferred — already standard in OMOP Condition domain; usually skips Maps-to walk).

column.name: code_icd10cm
column.description: ICD-10-CM code (fallback when no SNOMED). Stage-2 resolves via Maps-to.

column.name: code_icd10
column.description: ICD-10 (non-CM) — international rather than US clinical modification.

column.name: code_text
column.description: Human-readable label, last-resort fallback when no coded value resolves.

column.name: onset_period_start
column.description: onsetPeriod.start branch. Used if onset_dt is absent.

column.name: abatement_period_end
column.description: abatementPeriod.end branch. Fallback when abatement_dt absent.

column.name: clinical_status_code
column.description: active/recurrence/relapse/inactive/remission/resolved (from condition-clinical CodeSystem). → condition_status_source_value; mapped via cm.fhir_clinical_status_to_omop. Only 'resolved' has a clean OMOP match (32906).

column.name: verification_status_code
column.description: unconfirmed/provisional/differential/confirmed/refuted/entered-in-error (condition-ver-status CodeSystem). Semantically closer to OMOP Condition Status than clinicalStatus is — 'confirmed'→32893, 'provisional'→32899. Stage-2 prefers this over clinical_status_code.

column.name: recorded_date
column.description: When the condition was recorded. Useful fallback for condition_start_date.
